ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-08-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On April 24, 2003
Off Calendar Apr-25-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Plaintff, Peter Wolf present with counsel, John Riccio.
Plaintiff was sworn and examined. The Courts hears evidence and grants judgment as follows:
Damages $25,000.00, Prejudgment interest $3,187.49, Costs $486.00, Total $28,673.49
Judgment signed in open court.
